title: Data Analyst
summary: Data Analyst with 3 years of experience. Focused on measurable outcomes, cross-functional collaboration and reliable knowledge graph extraction signals. Core strengths include Tableau, SQL, A/B Testing, Excel.

experiences.description: Delivered measurable work in data / retail using BigQuery, ETL, Looker Studio, Power BI. Collaborated with product, engineering and operations teams to improve delivery quality.
achievements: Reduced manual effort by 35% through process and tooling improvements
Improved reporting or service reliability with BigQuery and ETL
Worked with cross-functional stakeholders and documented repeatable workflows
